news.t: Xtrackers Launches S&P 500 Diversified Sector Weight ETF: A Multi-Dimensional Approach to Sector Diversification in U.S. Large-Cap Equities

holdings.infoBox: SPXD is an equity ETF with a total of 505 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 3.64%, Jabil at 2.01%, Abbott Laboratories at 1.41%, The Procter & Gamble Company at 1.38%, and Costco Wholesale at 1.22%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P 500 Diversified Sector Weight ETF (SPXD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Diversified Sector Weight index. The fund tracks an equally weighted version of the S&P 500 index. Investments consist of large-cap US stocks SPXD was launched on Jul 24, 2025 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: Xtrackers Launches S&P 500 Diversified Sector Weight ETF: A Multi-Dimensional Approach to Sector Diversification in U.S. Large-Cap Equities
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, a leading European asset manager with global reach, today announced the launch of the Xtrackers S&P 500 Diversified Sector Weight ETF (NASDAQ: SPXD) (the “Fund”), expan...
